productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Girls White Dial Analog Watch
description: Style Note Check out Q& Q's latest collection of watches for kids. Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Now let your little one flaunt her timely bling with panache. Product Details Case style: Pink plastic round case Dial style: White and pink dial with silver hands and cartoon print on the dial Strap style: Blue plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark and screw to reset time Water resistant to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 25 mm Case thickness: 6 mm
